title: roegneria albicans
intro: Roegneria albicans, also known as Roegneria trichophora, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Roegneria albicans include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce fever. Roegneria albicans is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or extract, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional Asian medicine.
